channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Xreal, Google’s smartglasses partner, thinks it has finally mastered this notoriously tricky industry
item.description: Chi Xu, the founder and CEO of XREAL, thinks the smart glasses business has finally reached a turning point.

item.title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced creative director says his top three favorite elements of the remake are the fight system, the new missions, and the new end game chapters — 'We have received a lot of positive reactions to the story'
item.description: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced creative director Paul Fu has shared his favorite new elements that Ubisoft has added to the upcoming remake.

item.title: This is the world's first dual-sided monitor with recto verso displays — Philips sticks two full HD panels back-to-back
item.description: Philips introduces dual-sided Full HD monitor designed for shared workspaces, enabling independent or mirrored usage across rotating display surfaces.

item.title: The White House is reportedly forcing its official app onto all government employee phones
item.description: You gotta pump up those download numbers somehow.

item.title: I’ll keep using Duolingo but this AI language learning app has a hold on me
item.description: Homescreen Heroes: Promova is a popular AI-powered language-learning app

item.title: I've turned my old Android phones into 5G routers, power banks, and more — here's how you can do the same
item.description: If you're thinking about buying a new Android phone, you don't have to throw away your old one — here are seven ways you can give an older mobile new life.

item.title: 9 outils de surveillance au travail utilisés en France transmettent vos clics à Google, Microsoft et Meta
item.description: Les logiciels que votre employeur utilise pour vous surveiller envoient vos données à Google et Meta. Aucun des neuf outils testés n'y échappe.
